title: المثول الفوري كبديل لمنظومة التلبس بالجرم
author: bouseida faissal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The flagrant misdemeanor is considered to be the oldest institution of procedure which aims at achieving the principle of the speed of criminal proceedings. This institution has given way to the other in the last few years. Which is a partial and not a full-fledged alternative, is intended to ensure rapid trials in most of the cases That the public prosecutor considers the possibility of applying this procedure on them, the immediate appearance is also to strengthen the confidence of victims in justice.
